title: Minecolonies - Minecraft Vanilla Food Tiered
description: Turns vanilla Minecraft food into something the Minecolonies food tier system registers.
body:
This mod seamlessly integrates vanilla Minecraft food items into the MineColonies tiered food system. It categorizes common foods into Bronze, Silver, and Gold tiers, ensuring your citizens receive the correct quality and happiness bonuses from a wider variety of meals. No more citizen complaints about low-quality food when you're serving up steak and golden carrots!

### IF YOU HAVE THIS MOD, REPORT BUGS HERE. I don't have enough knowledge in coding to implement what they're suggesting in the discord (to use an API) so I welcome anyone who's willing to explain what I need to do. Until now I'll keep this published.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Shameless Self-Plug, except with a little shame. Ignore this if you're just here for the goods.

Full honesty, I know nothing about mods at all. There were a few things I wanted to change for QOL purposes to minecolonies so I tried really hard to figure out exactly what I could do.

I don't know what changes from version to version because I've never done anything like mod or make anything like this except for my MC server as a custom thing, which is typically perpetually using the ATM 9 modpack. I believe this should work with any version of minecolonies and forge. This could also hypothetically work for any other version of the game(?) but I have no idea, really.

But, I do run a MC server running 1.20.1 and ATM 9 with some custom additions. The server is specifically aimed at minecolonies and we have an economy and everything that I'm very proud of. Super small, super tight knit. So I'll leave a discord link in the description.

https://discord.gg/nBAnJNrN5T

Also, I'm disabled but I'm trying to be a writer ultimately, but I'm super project focused and my community is the proudest thing I've ever done. Everything I do will most likely be released for free, but I do want to say that I have a patreon because I make very little in my day to day. And if you pay money and say you're from here, I'll be more encouraged to actually figure out what to do and what to make past this involving Minecraft and Minecolonies. You can find me in a lot of places, btw, like itch.io and royalroad. Also I run The Nerdgasm Discord Server, my own home away from home. I also run a MC server off my computer. So when I say I get around I mean it.

Either way, I have 1 patreon and I never post there because no one's there in the first place, so do with that what you will. I'm still a chaotic little goblin who'll do whatever it takes to help people and grow the community so maybe if you stop by to say hi and that you enjoy the mod and I'll work more on it anyway. That's it for the spiel, let me know if it doesn't work for some reason.

patreon.com/zackman634

Also, I've decided to release mods like this a little bit early on my Patreon for bug testing. There's a free tier and usually everything should be accessible on there!
